name: mybrain
description: Personal semantic thought storage and retrieval MCP server with vector embeddings and ltree scoping

scripts.test: bash -c '_dbenv=$(mktemp) && ./scripts/test-db.sh up > "$_dbenv" && source "$_dbenv"; rm -f "$_dbenv"; node --test tests/brain/*.test.mjs; _rc=$?; ./scripts/test-db.sh down; exit $_rc'
